flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rowan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.4k → $16.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rowan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.4k → $26.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rowan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Rowan University rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (42.2% → 47.3%).
